feed.title: Default signet reorg history — was the fork at height 287766 (depth 19) deliberate?

entry.title: Default signet reorg history — was the fork at height 287766 (depth 19) deliberate?
entry.summary:
The email highlights an interesting perspective on the handling of deep reorganizations within blockchain networks. The sender expresses a preference for having the option to opt-out from deep reorgs, which are unusual or non-standard behaviors in blockchain operations typical to Mainnet environments. This approach suggests a desire for flexibility and control over the participation in significant structural changes that could affect stability or expected behavior in distributed ledger technology. The expression of liking the idea indicates approval and potential support for implementing such a feature, which could lead to enhanced user satisfaction and system resilience.
This discussion is indicative of ongoing debates within the blockchain community regarding how best to manage unexpected or extensive modifications to the network's operation, balancing between innovation, user autonomy, and system reliability.
